title: Triage an IAM AccessDenied from CloudTrail to the precise gap
description: Walk evaluation logic from explicit deny, to SCP/permission boundary, to identity vs resource policy, to condition-key mismatch before touching any grant.
body: Use when an API call fails with AccessDenied and you must find the minimal fix. Do not react by adding a wildcard grant. Actions: read the CloudTrail event for the exact action, resource ARN, and principal; check for an explicit Deny in identity policy, SCP, or permission boundary; confirm whether a resource policy (S3/KMS) must also allow the principal; then compare condition keys (aws:SourceArn, aws:PrincipalTag) against the request context. Validation signals include iam simulate-principal-policy reproducing the Deny and then Allow after the targeted statement, with CloudTrail clean on retry. Risk boundary: if the fix requires widening a boundary or SCP, stop and escalate to a human owner.
